title: EnderAddons
description: Adds new ender toolset/armorset, new ore & more!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/AFy7ZAsVTyo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# EnderAddons v1.0 features

* New armor and tool set that is upgraded to from netherite

* New blocks: Enderpearl Block, Endershard Ore, and Endershard Block.

* New items: Endershards and End Stars (used for upgrading to new stuff)

* All recipes on the [Wiki](https://github.com/TropicQuest/EnderAddons/wiki)

+ lots of plans for new additons in v2, such as new end biome, wood type, mobs, and more.
